fields.content: The exercise is aimed at combatting climate change and attaining 30% forest cover from 12.1% by 2032 as directed by the President of the Republic of Kenya and Commander-in-Chief of Defence Forces His Excellency William Ruto.

fields.title: Independence USA!
fields.content: In 2026, the United States will celebrate its 250th birthday (America250) on Saturday, July 4th, marking the Semiquincentennial (250th anniversary) of the Declaration of Independence with nationwide festivities, educational events, and patriotic commemorations across all states and territories
